description: Architecting a robust micro-frontend and service-based permission system for B2B scaling. Standardized development through a proprietary UI Kit and CI/CD automation, reducing delivery cycles by 50%.

Led the digital transformation of core fintech platforms from desktop to web. Implemented a complex NgRx-based state architecture with WebSockets to ensure real-time data integrity for millions of dollars in daily transactions.
Executed technical feasibility analysis and roadmap prioritization based on data quality gaps. Optimized high-value data asset exploitation to maximize ROI and prevent development waste.
Defined AI-driven product strategies for industrial and retail sectors. Designed descriptive and predictive dashboards to optimize enterprise decision-making through advanced data segmentation.
Developed and maintained core features for a Health Tech SaaS platform[cite: 35]. Focused on delivering high-quality web experiences for healthcare professionals and patients[cite: 35].
Developed an extensive suite of educational web games[cite: 36]. Focused on creating engaging, high-performance interactive experiences for a global user base[cite: 36].
